name: Bopparder Hamm Feuerlay
description: Horseshoe-shaped amphitheater with extremely steep slate slopes. Produces elegant, mineral Rieslings. Most famous site in Mittelrhein.
historicalNotes: Name 'Feuerlay' means 'fire slate.' August Perll, Matthias Müller make benchmark wines. Among Germany's steepest vineyards.

name: Bopparder Hamm Mandelstein
description: Part of famous Bopparder Hamm horseshoe. Very steep slate producing precise, mineral Rieslings.
historicalNotes: Name means 'almond stone.' Weingart makes excellent examples.

name: Bopparder Hamm Ohlenberg
description: Section of Bopparder Hamm amphitheater. Steep slate producing elegant, racy Rieslings.
historicalNotes: Part of the legendary horseshoe-shaped Hamm.

name: Bacharacher Hahn
description: Historic steep slate vineyard producing powerful, mineral Rieslings. Top site in Bacharach.
historicalNotes: Name means 'rooster.' Ratzenberger, Toni Jost make outstanding examples.

name: Bacharacher Posten
description: Steep slate slopes producing elegant, mineral Rieslings with great aging potential.
historicalNotes: Historic Bacharach site. Ratzenberger makes benchmark examples.

name: Oberwesel Oelsberg
description: Very steep slate producing taut, mineral Rieslings. Premier Oberwesel site.
historicalNotes: Mathern makes excellent examples from these challenging slopes.
